posts.title: Astonishingly Prolific Medical Researcher Churned Out AI-Slop Journal Articles. The self-described Harvard 'bioethicist' Bilal Irfan published 90 medical journal articles in 2-1/2 years, including "Will there be a future for newborns in Gaza?" in the prestigious British medical journal Lancet.

posts.title: Astonishingly Prolific Medical Researcher Churned Out AI-Slop Journal Articles. The self-described Harvard 'bioethicist' Bilal Irfan published 90 medical journal articles in 2-1/2 years, including "Will there be a future for newborns in Gaza?" in the prestigious British medical journal Lancet.

link_metadata.description: A stridently anti-Israel Harvard graduate student used artificial intelligence to churn out at least five of the more than 90 medical journal articles he published in two and a half years, including one about whether newborns have a future in Gaza, a Washington Free Beacon review shows.
